allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\nvm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Get-Command volta,fnm,nvm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Source; where.exe node 2>$null)
